hard_rules.description: Broker execution is allowed only after the verifier and risk/order compiler approve a decision.

hard_rules.description: Any non-HOLD decision must cite valid rulebook IDs and an applicable playbook ID.

hard_rules.description: A single position must not exceed the configured max risk percentage or max notional percentage of capital. Legacy validator compatibility also keeps the generic max leverage value.
